subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the mention of God! The letter thou didst address to his honour the Observer hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بذکر الهی نمیقه که بجناب ناظر مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید فی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
